code: public class StrategyDemo { public static void main(String[] args) { new Context((a, b) -> a + b).execute(5, 3); } interface Strategy { int doOperation(int a, int b); } static class Context { Strategy strategy; Context(Strategy s) { this.strategy = s; } void execute(int a, int b) { System.out.println("Result: " + strategy.doOperation(a, b)); } } }
